# Website Conversion Audit

> A Claude Code skill that finds why websites get traffic but no leads.

Crawls your live site and runs 7 automated diagnostic modules:
1. Crawl & Map — sitemap, dead pages, redirects
2. CTA & Funnel — broken anchor links, CTA positions, form fields
3. Mobile Contact — floating buttons, contact accessibility
4. Tracking — Meta Pixel, GA4, GTM, conversion events, UTM params
5. Social Sharing — OG tags, cross-page copy-paste, scraper simulation
6. Meta & Content — duplicate titles/descriptions, stale dates, language mix
7. Search Context — indexing gap, GSC, branded search

## Install
/plugin marketplace add crimeacs/website-conversion-audit
/plugin install website-conversion-audit

## Run
/website-conversion-audit https://yoursite.com

## Source
https://github.com/crimeacs/website-conversion-audit
